summary: The footage captures nighttime driving conditions with streetlights illuminating the road. A tanker truck is traveling alongside the ego-vehicle on the right side of the road. The tanker truck slows down considerably, prompting the ego-vehicle to brake abruptly. The camera experiences a sudden blackout, obscuring the view.

events_timeline.event: The tanker truck travels alongside the ego-vehicle on the right side of the road. Unknown
The tanker truck slows down considerably, prompting the ego-vehicle to brake abruptly.

uncertainties: The blackout obscures the view, making it difficult to discern further details.

risk_assessment.why: The tanker truck's sudden slowdown causes the ego-vehicle to brake abruptly, indicating a potential collision or near-collision scenario.
